steps.title: Find the rectangle area
steps.content:
The figure is made from a rectangle and a semicircle. The rectangle has side lengths $20$ and $5$, so its area is:
$$
20(5)=100
$$
The semicircle uses segment $WX$ as its diameter.

steps.title: Find the semicircle area
steps.content:
The diameter of the semicircle is $20$, so the radius is $10$. The area of a semicircle is half the area of the full circle:
$$
\frac{1}{2}\pi(10)^2=50\pi
$$

steps.title: Add the two areas
steps.content: Add the rectangle area and the semicircle area: $$ 100+50\pi $$ This is equivalent to $20(5)+50\pi$. The answer is C.
